# Add voter: r1 starts with only 1 voter but config says 3. MMA should add
# voters in two rounds: first adding one, confirming it, then adding another.

set-store quiet=true
  store-id=1 node-id=1 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=2 node-id=2 locality-tiers=zone=b
  store-id=3 node-id=3 locality-tiers=zone=c
----

store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    config=num_replicas=3
----

repair-needed
----
AddVoter: r1

# Round 1: repair adds a voter. With only s1 as an existing voter (zone=a),
# s2 (zone=b) and s3 (zone=c) are equally diverse; one is chosen at random.
repair store-id=1
----
[mmaid=1] applying replica change r1 type: AddReplica target store n3,s3 (replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)->(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL) to range 1 on store 3
[mmaid=1] addPendingRangeChange: change_id=1, range_id=1, change=r1 type: AddReplica target store n3,s3 (replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)->(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)
[mmaid=1] result(success): AddVoter repair for r1, adding voter on s3
pending(1)
change-id=1 store-id=3 node-id=3 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)

# Pending change suppresses further repair.
repair-needed
----
no ranges need repair

# Confirm the first addition: leaseholder reports 2 voters (s1 and s3).
store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    config=num_replicas=3
----

# Still under-replicated: needs another voter.
repair-needed
----
AddVoter: r1

# Round 2: repair adds another voter. With s1 (zone=a) and s3 (zone=c),
# s2 (zone=b) is the only remaining candidate.
repair store-id=1
----
[mmaid=2] applying replica change r1 type: AddReplica target store n2,s2 (replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)->(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL) to range 1 on store 2
[mmaid=2] addPendingRangeChange: change_id=2, range_id=1, change=r1 type: AddReplica target store n2,s2 (replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)->(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)
[mmaid=2] result(success): AddVoter repair for r1, adding voter on s2
pending(2)
change-id=1 store-id=3 node-id=3 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s enacted=0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)
change-id=2 store-id=2 node-id=2 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)

# Pending change suppresses further repair.
repair-needed
----
no ranges need repair

# Confirm the second addition: leaseholder reports 3 voters.
store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    config=num_replicas=3
----

# After both additions enacted, range is healthy.
repair-needed
----
no ranges need repair
